name: Lemon Supreme Chiffon
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs with the butter and 1/4 cup sugar. Spread half of this mixture on the bottom of a 9x13-inch loaf pan.
2. Mix the Jello, water, and lemon juice. Chill until partially set.
3. Beat egg whites stiffly and add the 2/3 cup sugar. Set aside.
4. Beat egg yolks and add to Jello mixture, mixing thoroughly.
5. Fold in beaten egg whites. Pour over the crumb mixture in the pan.
6. Whip the cream, adding 3 tbsp sugar gradually.
7. Spread whipped cream over Jello mixture.
8. Top with remaining crumb mixture.
9. Refrigerate several hours before serving.
